testcase.name: test_get_notfound

failure.message: TypeError: HTTPStatusError.__init__() missing 1 required keyword-only argument: 'request'

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_openlibrary.TestOpenLibrary testMethod=test_get_notfound> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4424027984'>
@patch('httpx.Client.get') def test_get_notfound(self, mock_get): # This tests that if httpx.raise_for_status() raises an exception, # (e.g. 404 or 500 HTTP response) it is not swallowed by the client. mock_get.return_value.raise_for_status = raise_http_error suffixes = {'edition': 'M', 'work': 'W', 'author': 'A'} for _type, suffix in suffixes.items(): target = f"OLnotfound{suffix}" with pytest.raises(httpx.HTTPStatusError): > _ = self.ol.get(target) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_openlibrary.py:258: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ olclient/openlibrary.py:748: in get return self.Edition.get(olid) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ olclient/openlibrary.py:378: in get response = cls.OL.get_ol_response(path) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/backoff/_sync.py:105: in retry ret = target(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ olclient/openlibrary.py:150: in get_ol_response response.raise_for_status() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def raise_http_error(): r = httpx.Response # Non 4xx status will trigger backoff retries r.status_code = 404 kwargs = {'response': r} > raise httpx.HTTPStatusError("test HTTPError", **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: HTTPStatusError.__init__() missing 1 required keyword-only argument: 'request'
tests/test_openlibrary.py:54: TypeError

testcase.name: test_get_work_by_metadata
